76: But thanks to the people of Oblivion, I was able to gain access to the military's research logs. And there I came across something called the “regeneration factor.”
But thanks to the people of Oblivion, I was able to gain access to external records, and came across something called the “regeneration factor.”

79: Apparently, Lindblum scientists had developed a stimulant to enhance their soldiers' regeneration factor. This is what we need.
Apparently, Lindblum scientists had researched a stimulant that enhances the factor. This is what we need.

80: But...that was centuries ago. Does the stimulant even still exist?
But that was centuries ago in another nation. Assuming the stimulant exists, how would we obtain it?

81: As a matter of fact, it was clearly indicated in a report that its formula has been determined.
There was a statement that claimed its formula was later determined.
